name: investigation-jss-feed
description: Investigation into the JSS (Job Seeker Safety) DIHE spike driven by home feed. A separate SEV from the ongoing Ads-driven JSS DIHE SEV 3. DS confirmed the data issue is fixed and the feed elevation is real. Initial signal points to fake hiring scams in groups. Goal: triage root cause, assess severity, and recommend mitigations.

artifacts.title: Proposal: Sev levels for JSS DIHE / 1K
artifacts.description: SEV threshold calculator for JSS DIHE. Defines WoW T7D thresholds: SEV 4 at 20%, SEV 3 at 25%, SEV 2 at 30%, SEV 1 at 45%.

artifacts.title: JSS Feed DIHE Triage Summary
artifacts.description: Sam Basole's L1 triage analysis. Root cause: ATO group spam fake job scam campaign. 240 accounts, 443K victims, +284% WoW on ORIGINAL_IA_GROUP_POST/ATO. Includes abuser profiles, scam templates, targeted groups, datasets, and queries.

artifacts.title: Abuse Incident: March Job Seeker Safety Ads DIHE
artifacts.description: The existing Ads-driven JSS DIHE SEV 3 incident doc. Covers Zambia/Brazil/Ukraine fake account cohorts and ATO ad campaigns. 705 MIDs, 46K+ ad creatives. Key mitigation: Tier 4 bypass fix. Used for overlap analysis with the Feed SEV.

artifacts.title: JSS DIHE by Harm Type (Raw Volume)
artifacts.description: Retina chart showing raw DIHE volume broken down by harm_type (VIEWED_AD, VIEWED_HOME_FEED_UPDATE, RECEIVED_INVITATION, etc.) from late Feb through Mar 30. Shows the Ads spike and Feed elevation. Note: this is absolute volume, not the DIHE/1k T7D metric.

artifacts.title: Scaled DIHE by surfaces (Overall, not JSS-filtered)
artifacts.description: Overall DIHE by harm_type. Confirms VIEWED_HOME_FEED_UPDATE spike at end of March is platform-wide, not JSS-specific. Useful to validate that the Feed increase affects all members, not just Job Seekers.
